name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir peanut butter and confectioner's sugar until smooth. Chill for 15 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, beat sugars, butter, and cream cheese until light and fluffy.
3. Add vanilla extract and egg. Combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder; add to cream cheese mixture and mix well.
4. Roll into 1-inch balls. Place half of the balls 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
5. Make a depression in the center of each ball with your thumb; fill with 1 teaspoon of chilled peanut butter mixture.
6. Flatten remaining balls and place on top, pressing edges to seal.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
8. Remove to a wire rack to cool.
9. Combine frosting ingredients in a small bowl; stir until smooth.
10. Frost cooled cookies. Yield: 2 dozen.
FROSTING
1 cup confectioner's sugar
2 ounces cream cheese, softened
2 tablespoons cocoa powder
1 tablespoon milk
